description: Composition Multicoloured round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves with woven tape detailing on the cuffs, embroidery, mirror work and woven tape detailing on the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The inspiration for this kurta from aneri for women is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart workwear. The modern Indian working woman has come into her own, as has her wardrobe. This piece epitomizes how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unify to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colourblocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. For those who want to keep their look classic and chic, pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
